title: Pen-shaped input and/or output device and method for generating a haptic signal
abstract: A pen-shaped input and/or output device and a method for generating a haptic signal are disclosed. In an embodiment a device includes an actuator unit comprising a piezoelectric actuator, wherein the device is a pen-shaped input and/or output device, and wherein the pen-shaped input and/or output device is configured to determine an acceleration based on voltages recorded by the piezoelectric actuator.
claims: 1. A device comprising: an actuator unit comprising a piezoelectric actuator, wherein the device is a pen-shaped input and/or output device; and a first electronics circuit configured to apply a voltage to the piezoelectric actuator thereby stimulating the piezoelectric actuator into vibration for generating a haptic signal, and wherein the pen-shaped input and/or output device is configured to detect a tilt angle of the pen-shaped input and/or output device and to adjust a level of the voltage applied to the piezoelectric actuator by the first electronics circuit by taking the detected tilt angle of the pen-shaped input and/or output device into account, and/or wherein the pen-shaped input and/or output device is configured to detect a speed of the pen-shaped input and/or output device and to adjust a level of the voltage applied to the piezoelectric actuator by the first electronics circuit by taking the detected speed of the pen-shaped input and/or output device into account, and/or wherein the pen-shaped input and/or output device is configured to determine an acceleration of the pen-shaped input and/or output device based on voltages recorded by the piezoelectric actuator and to adjust a level and a frequency of the voltage applied to the piezoelectric actuator by the first electronics circuit adjusted by taking detected acceleration of the pen-shaped input and/or output device into account.
